title: touchiroa zeylanica
intro: Touchiroa zeylanica, also known as Indian valerian or Valeriana wallichii, is a plant species in the family Valerianaceae, native to the Himalayan region and parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include sedative and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Touchiroa zeylanica include relief from insomnia, anxiety, and restlessness, as well as pain relief and improved sleep quality. Herbal preparations of Touchiroa zeylanica include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
